title: echinopsis ferox subsp. potosina
intro: Echinopsis ferox subsp. potosina, also known as the Potosi pitaya or Pitaya Potosina, is a cactus species native to Mexico, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and robust stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Echinopsis ferox subsp. potosina include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with these conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as an infusion or made into a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
